passage.title: A Day with Factory & Sports + Sound & Maths Vocabulary
passage.text: The factory's assembly line runs fast. Cricket is the most popular sport in India. The football team won the match. Hockey is our national game. I like playing badminton. He got first place in the race. The players are running on the field. The team performed well. The match is tomorrow evening. The ball went out of the boundary.
passage.hindiTranslation: फैक्ट्री की असेंबली लाइन तेज़ चलती है। क्रिकेट भारत में सबसे लोकप्रिय खेल है। फुटबॉल टीम ने मैच जीता। हॉकी हमारा राष्ट्रीय खेल है। बैडमिंटन खेलना मुझे पसंद है। उसने दौड़ में पहला स्थान पाया। खिलाड़ी मैदान में दौड़ रहे हैं। टीम ने अच्छा प्रदर्शन किया। मैच कल शाम को है। गेंद सीमा के बाहर चली गई।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "The factory's assembly line..."?
options: The team performed well.
There was complete silence at night.
Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
The factory's assembly line runs fast.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: The factory's assembly line runs fast.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "The factory's assembly line runs fast."

Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "Cricket is the most popular sport in India."
